productName: Northwest Concentrates - CLASSIC DABS - GG4 - 1g [ I ]
description: Classic hybrid BHO crafted from Gg # 4 — hydrocarbon-extracted, fully purged, and dense with cannabinoids for an efficient, hard-hitting dab. Efficient and hard-hitting, with notes of pungent, earthy, and pine, delivering a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
